name: callee_saved_rbx_clobber
trigger: Function with inline-asm "rbx" clobber list — caller depends on %rbx being preserved per ABI.
causal_chain: inline asm declares rbx clobber → ABI requires callee to save/restore rbx → codegen emits push %rbx … pop %rbx OR allocates rbx via callee-saved register allocator → caller's rbx-bound value preserved across call → b == a + 1.
suggested_fix: (reference behavior) ensure the codegen honors callee-saved register list when reaching IR/AST boundary; saved-register region must not overlap with parameter or alloca slots (CG-24).
counterexamples_tried: changed clobber list to "rcx" — works under both compilers (caller-saved, no obligation)
returned long long instead of long — same behavior under both
remaining_uncertainty: with a hand-written buggy ZCC backend (no rbx save), b would be undefined — likely 1, leading to exit 1; this corpus entry is a regression seal not an active bug repro.
